strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript/Node.js and React
Current role includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
Strong TDD, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship background
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin; Java exposure is dated (robotic arms era)
Cloud/containerization depth unclear beyond AWS CDK and Docker mentions
response.justification: Candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with a strong fullstack TypeScript/Node.js/React profile, active AI-agent and MCP work that maps directly to the role's agentic focus, and a documented craftsmanship culture (TDD, pairing, trunk-based). Gaps are minor: no explicit Nest.js, dated Kotlin/Java, and cloud breadth is implied rather than detailed. Overall a strong fit worth interviewing to validate framework specifics.
